info.title: BentLabKids API
info.description: Authentication, user management, and content API for BentLabKids.

post.summary: Sign in with email and password

post.description: Upload up to 10 images (jpg, png, webp, max 5MB each) and/or one video (mp4, webm, mov, max 1GB) with an optional thumbnail.

get.description: Returns both Cloudinary images and Prisma videos. Use 'type' to filter: 'image', 'video', or 'all' (default). Images use cursor pagination; videos use page/limit.

delete.summary: Delete an uploaded image from Cloudinary
delete.description: Permanently deletes an image from Cloudinary by its public ID.

parameters.name: imageId
parameters.description: Cloudinary public ID of the image

post.description: Links a VideoAsset to a Content record of type VIDEO. Slug is auto-generated from title if omitted. Field mapping: content=description, verseReference=bible reference, image=thumbnail URL, videoAssetId=video ID.

example.title: Noah's Ark
example.content: An animated retelling of Noah's Ark for kids ages 3-7

post.description: Images must be Cloudinary URLs from the upload endpoint.

get.description: Returns the single store configuration row. Creates a default row on first call if none exists.

patch.description: Upserts the store configuration. Only one settings row can ever exist (singleton pattern).

get.description: Returns all available admin roles with their permissions and user counts. Any admin can access this.

post.description: Create a role with a name and a list of permissions. Requires MANAGE_USERS permission.

patch.description: Update a role's name, description, or permissions. Permissions are replaced entirely. Requires MANAGE_USERS.

delete.description: Delete a role. All users assigned to this role will have their role removed. Requires MANAGE_USERS.

get.summary: List all users with admin roles
get.description: Paginated list of all users who have a role assigned. Requires MANAGE_USERS permission.

post.description: Sends an invitation email with a secure setup link. The admin sets their own password. Invitation expires in 48 hours.

get.description: Public endpoint. Returns invitation details if the token is valid, unused, and not expired.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Invitation token from the email link

post.description: Public endpoint. Creates the admin account and activates it. The token is invalidated permanently after use.

patch.summary: Assign a role to a user
patch.description: Promote a regular user to admin by assigning a role. Requires MANAGE_USERS permission.

delete.description: Demote an admin back to a regular user by removing their role. Requires MANAGE_USERS permission.

get.description: Returns total users, new users this month, and active users.
Paginated list of all users with search, status filter, and sort by date joined.

CreateContentInput.description: Used for stories, prayers, and video contents. For videos: content=description, verseReference=reference, image=thumbnail, videoAssetId=video ID.

description.description: Short description (used as video description for video contents)

duration.description: Reading time in minutes (auto-calculated if omitted)

videoAssetId.description: VideoAsset ID (required when type is VIDEO)

prayerWhen.description: When to say this prayer (e.g. 'Before bed', 'In the morning')

videoAssetId.description: VideoAsset ID (required when type is VIDEO)

prayerWhen.description: When to say this prayer (e.g. 'Before bed', 'In the morning')
When to say this prayer (e.g. 'Before bed')

image.description: Image file (jpg, png, webp) — omit to keep existing

images.description: Cloudinary image URLs from upload endpoint

lastUpdatedBy.description: Email or ID of the admin who last updated the store

roleId.description: ID of the role to assign

email.description: Email of the admin to invite

roleId.description: ID of the role to assign
ID of the role to assign

sessionCookie.name: better-auth.session_token
sessionCookie.description: Paste your session token from Postman, or sign in via POST /api/v1/sign-in first.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Sign-up, sign-in, password reset, and user session

tags.name: Admin / Upload
tags.description: Upload and list images and videos

tags.name: Admin / Video Contents
tags.description: Manage video content entries (links VideoAssets to Content)

tags.name: Admin / Videos
tags.description: View, update, and delete individual videos

tags.name: Admin / RBAC
tags.description: Manage admin roles, permissions, and user assignments
